title: Debounce a function in TypeScript
explanation:
## Problem
Prevent a function from firing too frequently (search input, resize handler).

## Approach
Close over a timer reference. Each call clears the previous timer and schedules a new one. Only fires after `delay` ms of silence.

## Complexity
- Time: O(1) per call
- Space: O(1)

codeBlocks.caption: Generic debounce utility
useDebounce React hook
